jobs.body: Founded an education non-profit, CovEducation (coved.org), focused on providing mentorship to public school students adversely impacted by the COVID-19 pandemic.
jobs.excerpt: Founded an education non-profit, CovEducation (coved.org), focused on providing mentorship to public school students adversely impacted by the COVID-19 pandemic.

jobs.body: Undergraduate Teaching Assistant for Honors Operating Systems (CS439H) taught by Professor Gheith.
jobs.excerpt: Undergraduate Teaching Assistant for Honors Operating Systems (CS439H) taught by Professor Gheith.

jobs.body:
Developed a data quality framework to monitor the real time market data platform used across Citadel.
- Wrote a feed handler in C++ to receive realtime market data from Bloomberg’s BPIPE API.
- Interfaced with KDB time series database to dynamically retrieve historical and realtime market data.
- Created a Python binding for a fast sequence comparison algorithm written in C++.
jobs.excerpt: Developed a data quality framework to monitor the real time market data platform used across Citadel. Wrote a feed handler in C++ to receive realtime market data from Bloomberg’s BPIPE API. Interfaced with KDB time series database to dynamically retrieve historical and realtime market data. Created a Python binding for a fast sequence comparison algorithm written in C++.

jobs.body:
Designed and implemented a developer-facing metrics aggregation library in Typescript for the rendering engine and reusable components which power a new microservice architecture for Amazon’s retail site.
- Used Prometheus for metrics aggregation and AWS CloudWatch to store aggregated metrics.
- Wrote a metrics publisher for CloudWatch in Go.
jobs.excerpt: Designed and implemented a developer-facing metrics aggregation library in Typescript for the rendering engine and reusable components which power a new microservice architecture for Amazon’s retail site. Used Prometheus for metrics aggregation and AWS CloudWatch to store aggregated metrics. Wrote a metrics publisher for CloudWatch in Go.

jobs.body:
Built dashboards to aid analysts in viewing and finding patterns in unstructured data from historical projects .
- Deployed an internal Elasticsearch cluster and React front end with Docker for indexing and searching operations data.
jobs.excerpt: Built dashboards to aid analysts in viewing and finding patterns in unstructured data from historical projects . Deployed an internal Elasticsearch cluster and React front end with Docker for indexing and searching operations data.

jobs.body:
Developed desktop applications to visualize seismic data to map hydraulic fractures underground
- Built a desktop application for use by analysts with Electron, Angular 2, and the Polymer Project to interface with code written in R in order to plot 2D and 3D diagrams of fractures.
jobs.excerpt: Developed desktop applications to visualize seismic data to map hydraulic fractures underground Built a desktop application for use by analysts with Electron, Angular 2, and the Polymer Project to interface with code written in R in order to plot 2D and 3D diagrams of fractures.
